corporate_minimalism.label: Corporate Minimalism
corporate_minimalism.description: Clean white/gray space, single subject focus, geometric shapes, muted palette. Professional and authoritative without being cold.
corporate_minimalism.prompt_keywords: clean, minimal, white space, professional, geometric, muted colors, studio lighting, sharp focus, structured
corporate_minimalism.negative_keywords: cluttered, busy, cartoonish, neon, hand-drawn, grungy, distressed

neubrutalism.label: Neubrutalism
neubrutalism.description: Bold outlines, raw shapes, high contrast, intentionally 'unfinished', thick black borders. Playful rebellion against polished design.
neubrutalism.prompt_keywords: bold outlines, thick black borders, raw, unfinished, high contrast, flat color blocks, chunky shapes, visible grid
neubrutalism.negative_keywords: gradient, smooth, polished, corporate, subtle, realistic, photographic

warm_tech.label: Warm Tech
warm_tech.description: Technology meets humanity — warm lighting, natural tones, real people using tech, not cold/sterile. The human side of innovation.
warm_tech.prompt_keywords: warm lighting, natural tones, real people, human-centric, cozy workspace, golden hour, authentic, candid
warm_tech.negative_keywords: cold blue, sterile, dark, futuristic, robotic, cyber, neon, artificial

dark_luxury.label: Dark Luxury
dark_luxury.description: Deep blacks, gold/cream accents, dramatic lighting, negative space. Exclusivity and premium positioning through visual restraint.
dark_luxury.prompt_keywords: dark background, dramatic lighting, gold accent, luxury, premium, elegant, sophisticated, moody, cinematic
dark_luxury.negative_keywords: bright, colorful, casual, cluttered, generic, budget, cheap-looking

editorial_bold.label: Editorial Bold
editorial_bold.description: Magazine-quality layouts, strong type hierarchy, curated imagery, confident whitespace. Storytelling through strategic design choices.
editorial_bold.prompt_keywords: editorial, magazine-quality, strong typography, dramatic composition, curated, sophisticated, high fashion, art directed
editorial_bold.negative_keywords: template-looking, generic, safe, boring, standard grid, stock-photo-ish

soft_pastel.label: Soft Pastel / Dreamy
soft_pastel.description: Light, airy, pastel tones with soft gradients. Calming and approachable. Often with rounded shapes and gentle shadows.
soft_pastel.prompt_keywords: soft pastel colors, dreamy, light, airy, gentle gradients, rounded corners, calming, ethereal, delicate
soft_pastel.negative_keywords: harsh, dark, aggressive, angular, industrial, gritty, neon, bold

retro_vintage.label: Retro / Vintage
retro_vintage.description: Nostalgic aesthetics referencing specific decades (60s-90s). Warm filters, classic typography, analog textures. Authentic and characterful.
retro_vintage.prompt_keywords: retro, vintage, nostalgic, film grain, warm tones, old-school, classic typography, analog, faded colors, throwback
retro_vintage.negative_keywords: futuristic, digital, ultra-modern, clean tech, minimalist, neon, holographic

futuristic_tech.label: Futuristic / Cyber Tech
futuristic_tech.description: Neon glows, holographic effects, dark backgrounds with bright accents. Technology-forward and cutting-edge.
futuristic_tech.prompt_keywords: futuristic, neon glow, holographic, cyber, dark background, sci-fi, tech-forward, glass, volumetric lighting
futuristic_tech.negative_keywords: warm, natural, organic, vintage, rustic, earthy, traditional, pastoral

organic_natural.label: Organic / Natural
organic_natural.description: Earth tones, natural textures, botanical elements. Authentic, sustainable, and grounded. Connection to nature.
organic_natural.prompt_keywords: natural textures, earth tones, organic, botanical, sustainable, rustic, handmade feel, authentic, unprocessed
organic_natural.negative_keywords: synthetic, neon, artificial, plastic, digital, cold, sterile, futuristic

playful_geometric.label: Playful Geometric
playful_geometric.description: Bold shapes, primary-ish colors, Memphis-inspired patterns. Fun, accessible, and energetic without being childish.
playful_geometric.prompt_keywords: geometric shapes, playful, colorful, bold patterns, Memphis-inspired, fun, energetic, abstract shapes, dynamic layout
playful_geometric.negative_keywords: serious, corporate, muted, subtle, monochrome, conservative, traditional

data_driven.label: Data-Driven / Analytical
data_driven.description: Charts, graphs, and data visualization as primary visual elements. Clean, precise, and information-rich.
data_driven.prompt_keywords: data visualization, charts, clean graphs, analytical, precise, information design, dashboard aesthetic, structured data
data_driven.negative_keywords: vague, emotional, impressionistic, hand-drawn, organic, unstructured

maximalist_eclectic.label: Maximalist / Eclectic
maximalist_eclectic.description: More is more. Rich layering, pattern mixing, saturated colors, decorative elements. Expressive and unapologetically bold.
maximalist_eclectic.prompt_keywords: maximalist, eclectic, rich patterns, saturated colors, layered textures, decorative, ornate, bold, vibrant, mixed media
maximalist_eclectic.negative_keywords: minimal, clean, simple, understated, muted, corporate, restrained
